name: OurSpace functional repair pass
changes: Copied assets/json into root json and added an in-browser JSON bundle/fetch fallback for file:// and path drift.
Added repair layer for recurring daily/weekly/monthly calendar and today schedule rendering.
Added module bubble reopen behavior and desktop packing to prevent module overlap.
Rebuilt DBT skill suggestions so cards stay empty until Onyx suggests, user searches, or category is selected.
Added game dropdown repair, store aisle repair, and linked Google Calendar embed helper.
Compacted Onyx header/status pills and converted Onyx lore grid into horizontal carousel tabs.
Changed Onyx mood priority so DBT requests use advising/professor mood instead of hungry/body-care mood.
Removed visible Momma/Papa wording from profile/messenger UI while leaving Onyx direct-response relationship voice intact.
Diversified marquee language with the requested quotes and only short song fragments.
